Caption: (A) 3D model of the bioreactor with identified boundaries; (B) refined mesh generated in the 3D model of bioreactor.

Caption: Simulated results of temperature distribution in the 3D model of bioreactor during US-TM treatment at Y-Z plane and X-Y plane (Z = 23.2 mm where is the surface of P. fluorescens biofilm on the glass slide). The power of ultrasound was 100 W. The processing temperature was (A, B) 30 °C, (C, D) 40 °C, and (E, F) 50 °C. Unit in the colored labels is °C.

(A) Residue of P. fluorescens biofilm (%) and (B) viable count of P. fluorescens cells (Log10 CFU/mL) after the US-TM treatment for 15 min at the combined four ultrasound power levels (0, 60, 80, and 100 W) and three temperature levels (30, 40, and 50 °C). Significant differences of values within each temperature level are indicated by lowercase letters (p < 0.05). Significant differences of values within each power level of the ultrasound are indicated by capital letters (p < 0.05).

CLSM images of P. fluorescens biofilm after the US-TM treatment for 15 min at the combined (Ⅰ-Ⅳ) four ultrasound power levels (0, 60, 80, and 100 W) and (A-C and a-c) three temperature levels (30, 40, and 50 °C). The first and the second row at the same temperature represented (A-C) 2D and (a-c) 3D CLSM images, respectively.

SEM images of P. fluorescens biofilm (4,000 and 8,000 × magnification) after the US-TM treatment for 15 min at the combined (Ⅰ-Ⅳ) four ultrasound power levels (0, 60, 80, and 100 W) and (A-C) three temperature levels (30, 40, and 50 °C).
